def handle_request(req):
    # Violation: function body contains setup, validation, execution, and formatting all at once
    db_conn = connect_db()
    if not req.user_id:
        return "Invalid", 400
    user = db_conn.query(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id={req.user_id}")
    result = {"name": user.name.upper(), "email": user.email.lower()}
    return f"User: {result['name']} <{result['email']}>"
